title: geranium hayatanum
intro: Geranium hayatanum, also known as Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geranium hayatanum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
